testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Toggle state did not change did not expect [false] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Toggle state did not change did not expect [false] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failEquals(Assert.java:1582) at org.testng.Assert.assertNotEqualsImpl(Assert.java:157) at org.testng.Assert.assertNotEquals(Assert.java:2198) at steps.EnableQuickViewBalSteps.quick_view_balance_state_should_be_updated(EnableQuickViewBalSteps.java:39) at ✽.Quick View Balance state should be updated(file:///C:/Users/ma/eclipse-workspace/meezanbankApp/src/test/resources/features/EnableQuickViewBal.feature:9)
